title: Quick Start Guide - Osprey/Tern - First screen, single earbud/pairing - zoom in/out
scenario: Quick Start Guide zoom in/out toggle on pairing screen does not animate or match Figma spec on Voyager Free 60+
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Go to Home → Device Settings → Quick Start Guide.
Tap the blue circle button on the Quick Start Guide screen.
Verify the earbud image zooms in and the on-screen text matches the Figma Pairing screen design.
Tap the blue circle button again.
Verify the screen zooms out to the original view.
expected: The earbud zooms in on first tap with text matching the Figma Pairing screen, and zooms back out to the original view on second tap.
